59: Do the glyphs resemble those of the Tuliyollal saga?
Do the glyphs resemble those of the Tuliyollal Saga?

61: They do seem to be an example of Yok Huy pictorial storytelling, just like the pillars on Morrow's Measure. Although I believe the Tuliyollal saga was illustrated more to Mamool Ja tastes.
